_meta.description: Signal weights and regime multipliers. This is the ONLY file the self-refinement pass may modify.
_meta.philosophy: There are always winners in any market. The regime determines WHERE they are, not WHETHER they exist. Never reduce to zero — redirect.

risk_on.note: Broad momentum works. High RS, high beta, breakouts. Winners are everywhere.

trending_mixed.note: Momentum still works but needs a reason. Catalyst + momentum combos lead.

choppy_neutral.note: Pure momentum fades. Winners have specific catalysts or strong fundamentals driving them independent of market.

risk_off_mild.note: Sector rotation is the game. Find what IS working — defensives, commodities, short squeezes, idiosyncratic catalysts. Winners exist, look harder.

risk_off_severe.note: The biggest weekly winners often happen in brutal markets. Short squeezes, FDA approvals, takeovers, contra-trend sector pops. Catalyst and sentiment signals lead — find them.
